description: On the planet's surface, Enoch saves May from a Vrellnexian and introduces himself as Fitz's ally. Enoch helps assess May's injuries before they are both captured by a mysterious group after the threat of the roaches subsides.

transcript.line: Hello! That is the third Vrellnexian I have eliminated in pursuit of you! Not to toot my own horn, as you would say.
I would never say that. Who the hell are you?
My name is Enoch. Fitz sent me.
Fitz? How were you not eaten by those things?
They have no interest in me, as I have no tender insides for them to extract.
I thought Fitz was done building robots.
I am not a robot. I am a sentient Chronicom from the constellation you know as Cygnus. I am here to aid you, you who will save humanity, Melinda May, Jemma Simmons, Phillip J. Coulson.
Say that name again?
Phillip J. Coulson.
You're the son of a bitch from that diner who got us into this whole mess! You... Aah!
I am here to get you out of this whole mess. It would appear I got here just in time.
I'm managing.
Have you properly diagnosed the extent of your injuries?
Bilateral tear of the quadricep.
By all accounts, you should not be standing. Are you a doctor?
No. I'm a fighter.
Still? It may be time for a career change. There's a gravity storm approaching.
They're moving away. Are they afraid of gravity storms or you?
The Vrellnexians ride the gravity storms, but I don't think it's me. I think they're afraid of something else.
Aah! Aah! Aah! No! No!
